actions_this_tick: Loaded the OpenCode no-submit improvement-axis loop reference.
Verified OpenCode CLI/auth and ran a sentinel smoke test that returned OPENCODE_SMOKE_OK.
Inspected OS processes, GPU/CPU status, required UserKNN and jackknife reports/logs, runner state/quarantine, submission CSV mtimes, git status, and Hermes background processes.

Classified the long-running UserKNN gated residual fine-grid as STALLED_INCOMPLETE after about 14h51m with no JSON/MD report, empty artifact directory, and warning-only tail; terminated process group 18483 to prevent indefinite CPU burn.
Confirmed jackknife expanded remains FAILED_INCOMPLETE_NO_METRIC_REPORT and jackknife smoke remains WEAK_SIGNAL_STRICT_GATE_FAIL.

Launched one bounded OpenCode run using reports/20260607T041626KST_opencode_axis_loop_prompt.md with --format json and stdin closed; captured logs under logs/opencode_improvement_axis_loop_20260607T041626KST.jsonl.
Extracted OpenCode text to reports/20260607T041626KST_opencode_improvement_axis_loop_raw_text.md and verified sentinel OPENCODE_AXIS_LOOP_DONE_NO_SAFE_AXIS.
Validated OpenCode JSON report parseability and checked that no new submissions/*.csv appeared.

userknn_gated_residual_fine.classification_reason: The process ran about 14h51m at ~100% CPU, produced no metric report/artifact, and the log tail contained only repeated RuntimeWarning lines without a split completion line. It is not a STRICT_PASS/WEAK_SIGNAL/REJECT result; it is an incomplete stalled run and should not be relaunched as the same broad grid.

aggressive_quota_runner.note: Observed from older policy; this no-submit cron did not call Kaggle submit or modify runner policy.

opencode_verdict.new_axis_decision: No fresh independent, bounded, validation-only axis was credible under the strict gate; launching another probe would repeat stalled/weak/quarantined/public-negative families or create an underpowered one-split blip.
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses: Only after isolating/fixing the UserKNN NaN/complexity issue, consider a tiny deterministic UserKNN diagnostic with hard caps; do not relaunch broad fine-grid.
OOF residual calibration would need a new non-leaky validation design because prior rankblend/boundary residual variants are quarantined/public-negative.
New backbone/loss families exceed the bounded runtime and lack a current clue above strict gate.

gpu_cpu_snapshot_after_tick.cpu_observation: The UserKNN CPU-bound worker is no longer live after termination; only the pre-existing aggressive_quota_runner remains among matched project processes.

verification.secret_scan_touched_reports: no API/token/password patterns; 40-hex false positives in OpenCode JSONL are part.snapshot ids only

next_action: Do not launch another probe until a genuinely independent axis is identified. If continuing, first fix/diagnose UserKNN complexity/NaN behavior in a tiny validation-only smoke, or ask OpenCode for a fresh no-repeat axis with stricter evidence requirements. Continue to forbid Kaggle submission and full-test candidate CSV materialization in this cron.
